sections.description: An automated AI chatbot for WordPress. Dynamically syncs database content, captures leads, and logs them to Google Sheets using Google Gemini.
sections.installation:
🚀 Installation

  1. Upload the plugin files to the `/wp-content/plugins/raiseque-ai-chatbot` directory, or install the plugin through the WordPress plugins screen directly.
  2. Activate the plugin.
  3. Use the settings page to configure the Gemini API key and settings.
sections.faq:
FAQ

Do I need a paid Gemini API key? No, you can use the free tier API key from Google AI Studio.
